name: statusline
description: Configurable multi-line status bar with context health, cache hit rate, session duration, API rate limits (Anthropic 5h/7d + z.ai GLM), git branch, and active tools. Supports 1/2/3 line layouts, icon themes, and template presets.

interface.shortDescription: Configurable multi-line status bar with context health, cache hit rate, session duration, API rate limits (Anthropic 5h/7d + z.ai GLM), git branch, and active tools. Supports 1/2/3 line layouts, icon themes, and template presets.
